Package com.enovka.gemini4j.domain

Class Operator

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.Operator
  • public class Operator
extends Object
    Defines the valid operators that can be applied to a key-value pair.
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

      Supported by numeric and string.
      OperatorEnum getExcludes()
      Supported by string only when CustomMetadata value type for the given key has a stringListValue.
